description: I use to make charts to understand volumes, timelines and get important data to conduct te manegement of proje
author: Mauro F.
pros: The easy way to build visible smart charts, starting from the excel file.
cons: The update function with excel files could be easier.

review_title: Visualizing with arcgis plugin increased our conversions.
description: Overall, the experience has been positive, especially with customer conversion. In a teams call, we were able to interactvely answer questions about safety in their fleet and review risk hotspots.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked that it allowed our team to visualize the detailed vehicle telemetry and driver evaluator notes on an arcgis map. That was an aha moment for many of our clients, and they realized they wanted us to be their road safety experts.
cons: The pricing of the top tier (allowing the reports to be publically accessed without a user login) was very cost prohibitive. We would have adopted Power BI fully much sooner if that pricing tier wasnt so high.

review_title: Works well but did not like the user interface and user experience
description: Its an okay product with average experience. This product wouldn't be my first choice in data visualization but it gets the job done.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: A great data visualization software. It is feature packed and compatibility in running python scripts.
cons: Unintuitive user interface could use some improvements with a very steep learning curve, and technical issues may lead to some frustration in user experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Power BI is a powerful visualization app that is especially unlocked with knowledge of M and DAX. Some of its visualization options--like stacked charts--are especially useful for visualizing survey data. Its slicers and filters are also an easy way set up templates--which is especially useful for generating reports across different teams or clients.
cons: While it is primarily designed as an internal business intelligence tool, I wish that Power BI made it easier to share dashboards with users outside of your organization domain.

description: We use Power BI mainly for financial and operational reporting — management dashboards, trend analysis, and pulling data together from different systems.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is a powerful tool with a steep learning curve. Works well with Excel and amazing at pulling data from multiple sources. Also scales well
cons: This has a steep learning curve and not really for the non-technical user. Sharing reports requires paid licenses which can become expensive depending on your use. Having to republish to update data can be annoying.

description: I think this is a great system especially for big size companies. It is a great accounting software that has been built great.
author: YURI B.
pros: The Pros for Microsoft Power BI my number 1 thing is that it is easy to use. And it is a great database management system.
cons: I keep thinking of what Cons did I ran into with Power BI but I really can't think of any honestly a great system.

description: I've been using Microsoft Power BI since the beginning of the year and it has made my job more manageable with the easy access to and management of reports.
author: Charlene L.
pros: My company recently started using Power BI to manage the reports we use. Overall it has a friendly, easy to use and view interface. It makes pulling up and exporting reports quick and easy. I also love that everything can now be accessed from my mobile device as well.
cons: I have yet to encounter any real cons when using Microsoft Power BI. There was originally an issue with the reports updating but I believe that stemmed from my company and if anything it was quickly resolved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Microsoft power BI for platform creation and data visualization
description: We use the Microsoft Power BI mostly for creating dashboards with charts to visualize and analyze our data.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This tool comes in handy for analyzing the data. We use it also as a database to track some info on our respondents for a more efficient respondents management (with such info as project ID, respondent status: qualified or terminated, etc.)
cons: Nothing to mention here. It normally fulfills its purpose. It has all the necessary tools for storing and analyzing the data.

description: Performance with complex models, plus licensing tiers for some features, add to operational and cost
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: connect to many source, shape data with Power Query and publish report without waiting on BI project
cons: DAX and overall data modeling approach are powerful but not intuitive,star schema take time to learn

review_title: Analyzing Data Made Easy with Microsoft Power BI
description: My overall experience with Microsoft Power BI has been positive. While it can be a bit challenging to learn advance features, it remains a powerful tool for making data-driven decisions.
author: Vicente C.
pros: What I liked about Microsoft Power BI is how it turns complex data into clear visual reports. The drag and drop interface makes creating charts & reports intuitive.
cons: What I like least about Power BI is it can be overwhelming for beginners because of its many features and options.

review_title: MS Power BI - Best tool to start your Business Intelligence Career
description: Overall, PBI provides an easy-to-use, highly customizable and Dashboarding experience especially for someone who's starting to get into Business Intelligence tools and doesnt have a lot of techincal skills.
author: Yugank J.
pros: PBI is one of the best tools for Business Intelligence, given its ease of use, its cost (free, excluding PBI service), and its learning curve, which makes it very suitable for someone with no prior technical experience to use and navigate easily. Has a good and easy-to-understand UI and supports a lot of data input methods, practically every source possible, and the PBI service allows for automating a lot of reports as well.
cons: The customizability of the charts isn't as rich as in Excel or Tableau, and you need to understand how to model the data if you're dealing with multiple datasets and build relationships between them accordingly.

review_title: Microsoft Power BI makes dreams a reality in data analytics.
description: Together with my colleagues, we have had a smooth experience working with Microsoft Power BI to analyze our business data which help us to extract useful insights that allow us to monitor our business health and performance.
author: Tarek K.
pros: Microsoft Power BI offers very advanced data analytics features making it easy to analyze all our business data and get useful insights. Microsoft Power BI dashboards has interactive visualization options like graphs that help us to interpret our insights with ease. Microsoft Power BI has many secure data connectors that help us to securely collect business data from all data sources for extensive analytics.
cons: We have not seen any downsides of Microsoft Power BI and has not experienced any challenges at all while working with it.

description: The user-friendly interface makes it accessible for beginners, while still offering advanced features for experienced users.
author: Bien C.
pros: Power BI has an intuitive drag-and-drop interface that makes it easy for users of all skill levels to create interactive reports and dashboards.
cons: The licensing model can be a bit confusing, especially for new users trying to understand the differences between Power BI Free, Pro, and Premium.

description: Once familiar with the platform, creating interactive reports is easy and rewarding. Power BI has become an essential tool for making data-driven decisions and sharing clear insights with colleagues.
author: Alex J.
pros: Visualization options are extensive, making reports and dashboards visually engaging and highly customizable. Connecting to multiple data sources like Excel, databases, and cloud service is straightforward and reliable. Report sharing and collaboration are simple, with easy access from both the desktop app and web browser.
cons: Specialized formulas and calculations (such as DAX) require extra time to learn and can be challenging for those less familiar. Working with very large datasets can lead to slower performance or longer load times, and fine-tuning custom visuals sometimes feels cumbersome.

review_title: Good Tool with a Learning Curve
description: My overall experience is good. It's a very powerful tool that has helped me a lot with my work. You just need to be ready to spend some time learning how it works at first. Once you get the hang of it, it's very useful for data analysis.
author: Fohsoh D.
pros: I liked that Power BI is a strong tool for looking at and showing data. It is very good at making charts and graphs from a lot of information. This helps my team and I see our data clearly and share it easily with others in the company. The program is great for making dashboards that shows us all what we want and insights
cons: The hardest part was learning how to use it at the beginning. It took a while to understand how to get my data into the program and how to change the way things looked. It would be helpful to have better training materials or tutorials. Also, the look of the program feels a bit old and could be more modern

review_title: Power BI is a great way to create automated dashboard/reports
description: It has been great, we have set up many different dashboards that I check daily to analyze how marketing and A/B tests are going.
author: Alex T.
pros: To create custom dashboards that update automatically with our data pipeline. It's part of an automated process that saves me a lot of time.
cons: I don't really have anything negative to say about Power BI, it works great for our current use case.

description: We created reports monitoring manuscript movement, reviewer productivity, and issue scheduling. Decision-making is quicker, and stakeholders receive open feedback—first-rate value for our publishing data requirements.
author: Rodel C R.
pros: Power BI provides good value with easy-to-use dashboards, rapid deployment, and a clean UI that enables our editors to view submission patterns, reviewer response time, and publication schedules with little training investment.
cons: Some of the more advanced visuals are add-ons, which add steps for non-technical staff in high-pressure editorial cycles.

description: Really good! Great business impact and top notch analytics capabilities. There are some points which could be further improved, but overall competitive against competitors and better integrated in Microsoft ecosystem.
author: Antonio P.
pros: User friendliness, business analytics capabilities, continuous improvement and integration into Microsoft Fabric ecosystem
cons: DAX language, some limits regarding specific visuals not totally editable and also issues in terms of published report not detecting backend BI desktop changes in automatic, without republishing.
author_profession: Senior analyst and Advisor planning and engineering Europe

review_title: PowerBI is a must have for data and analytics
description: Overall, I’ve had a very positive experience with Microsoft Power Bi. It has made my life much easier.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Microsoft Power BI is an all in one solution. The ability to properly track and measure our teams important data is absolutely crucial to our company, and with Power BI we are able to do so seamlessly.
cons: It was a bit of a learning curve the first few days, but after that it was smooth sailing and I don’t have any complaints.

review_title: Power BI: A tool to increase efficiency in decision making and reporting.
description: Overall Power BI is an excellent tool for business analytics that enables organizations to visualize their data, share insights, and make data-driven decisions.
author: Shobhit K.
pros: Users can create interactive dashboards and reports, which allow for deeper insights
cons: For beginners, learning and navigating can be slow due to the complex structure.

review_title: Easy Tool for Turning Data into Clear Reports
author: Sumit K.
pros: I like that Power BI is easy to use and works well with Excel and other Microsoft tools. It helps me turn raw data into clear charts and dashboards without much effort. The reports are interactive and make it easy to understand trends and performance.
cons: Some features are not easy to learn at first, especially for beginners. It can also become slow when working with very large data files. To use all features, you need a paid plan, which may not suit everyone.

description: Overall we have had a great experience and customer service is super helpful and efficient. We have been trying to link it to our screens in our sales room but seem to keep having issues syncing.
author: Jax G.
pros: The quick reporting and accuracy! We are able to pull up to the second sales numbers and revenue! Our sales team love seeing where they are in sales and where the store is in total sales!
cons: We have had a few issues linking it to our OptiSigns but I think that it is more user error than the software.

review_title: Microsoft Power Bi is an amazing product that every business should utilize to enhance business growth
description: Microsoft Power Bi is user friendly and and efficient.
author: Taiwo I.
pros: It's ability to use the product to create an effective business report and analysis and It's unique features to import data from different apps and sites
cons: Microsoft power Bi is a very great app and I like everything about the app

description: We use it for data visualization and it has been meeting our needs thus far. We haven't worked with huge data sets, so can't really comment on that.
author: Karen L.
pros: While there is certainly a learning curve, the product is relatively easy to use once you get the hang of it. I like how you can slice & dice information for easy and interactive visuals.
cons: While there is minimal coding, you do need some basic skills.

author: Tanya L.
pros: BambooHR looks nice and feels not too heavy when using it. I mostly go in for time off or checking someone’s info, and that part goes fine.
cons: Sometimes I don’t really find fast what I need, or I click somewhere and it’s not where I expected to be. But in general, I think it’s a good tool and I don’t have many reasons to complain.
